archetype_description: No single dominant specialty, with a broad point-seeking profile across multiple race shapes.
profile_rationale: The saved 2026 results are strong across both stage-race and one-day contexts.
The local artifact set supports a genuinely broad profile rather than a single-lane classics-only or GC-only identity.
This custom mix lets Tudor keep a wide planning footprint while still rewarding its strongest one-day and finishing-speed lanes.
